condition: Severe shoulder injury suspected to be a rotator cuff tear or ligament damage
pain_location: Front and outer part of the shoulder, sometimes spreads down the arm
pain_nature: Sharp during movement with a deep throbbing ache at rest, weakness and tingling sensations
duration: Persistent for the past two weeks without relief
previous_history: Mild strain due to physical activity in the past but no significant previous shoulder injuries
functional_limitations: Very difficult to lift my arm, raise it above shoulder level, or move it normally
medical_history: No major medical conditions, overall health has been normal
red_flags: Large painful swelling around 8–9 inches, spreading sensation, numbness with tingling in the arm
treatments_taken: Anti-inflammatory medications, rest, consultation with a doctor without significant improvement
